final_answer:
Implemented: Bor + Heimdall cutover is now running on `gilt`/`giltconsd` naming, builds pass, and legacy `0xPolygon`/`amoy`/`mumbai`/`heimdalld` tokens are removed from Bor+Heimdall runtime codepaths.

Why this matters: the bridge stack now matches the Gold Chain naming target while staying buildable (`giltd` + `giltconsd`) instead of a half-old namespace.

Facts:
- Module/import cutover is active in [[heimdall-v2/go.mod]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/heimdall-v2/go.mod) and [[bor/go.mod]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/bor/go.mod), with local forked deps under [[heimdall-v2/.deps]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/heimdall-v2/.deps).
- `heimdalld` command path/files were renamed to `giltconsd` (for example [[cmd/giltconsd/main.go]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/heimdall-v2/cmd/giltconsd/main.go)).
- Legacy IPC/home names were cut over to `gilt.ipc` and `/var/lib/gilt-consensus`, while keeping a `bor.ipc` fallback in [[consolecmd.go]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/bor/cmd/geth/consolecmd.go) and [[attach.go]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/bor/internal/cli/attach.go).
- Chain naming in Bor CLI/server files was moved to `gilttestnet` + `gilttestnet-legacy` (for example [[gilttestnet.go]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/bor/internal/cli/server/chains/gilttestnet.go), [[gilttestnet-legacy.go]](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/bor/internal/cli/server/chains/gilttestnet-legacy.go)).

Checks run:
- `cd bridge/heimdall-v2 && make build` ✅
- `cd bridge/bor && make bor` ✅
- `cd bridge/heimdall-v2 && go test ./helper/...` ✅
- `cd bridge/bor && go test -run TestDoesNotExist ./cmd/geth ./internal/cli/...` ✅
- Additional compile checks on touched packages ✅

Actions next:
1. If you want strict zero legacy naming across all `bridge/*` (including migration fixtures), I’ll do one final pass for remaining `matic` fixture/migration tokens.
2. Then I’ll run the broader bridge test matrix (`make test` paths you choose) before commit.

Completion level: partial (runtime/codepath rename complete; full fixture-history token purge still pending by choice).  
Current blocker: remaining `matic` strings are mostly legacy migration/test fixture data that need a deliberate migration-fixture rewrite pass.
